description: Create an active 'Site Safety Induction Exam 2024' in LimeSurvey to determine subcontractor worksite eligibility. The survey must have assessment mode enabled and include a question group named 'OSHA Compliance'. Add four mandatory List (Radio) questions with specific assessment values: 'What is the standard color for Danger signs per OSHA?' (Red: 1, Yellow: 0, Orange: 0); 'At what height is fall protection generally required in construction?' (4 feet: 0, 6 feet: 1, 10 feet: 0); 'Who is responsible for maintaining a safe work environment?' (The Site Foreman only: 0, The Safety Officer only: 0, Everyone on site: 1); and 'What should you do if you discover a damaged ladder?' (Use it carefully: 0, Tag it Do Not Use and report it: 1, Leave it for someone else: 0). Set assessment rules to display 'FAIL - Retraining Required' for scores 0-3 and 'PASS - Induction Complete' for a score of 4.
